name: Lisas' Italian Macaroni and Cheese
recipeIngredient: 1 can (15 oz) ready-made diced tomatoes with juice
2 links sweet Italian sausage, cooked and crumbled drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except sliced cheese in a 9x13-inch baking dish.
2. Top with sliced cheese to cover.
3. Bake at 350°F for 30-45 minutes until lightly browned and bubbly.
